name: mcporter
tagline: ClawHub (197★): Use the mcporter CLI to list, configure, auth, and call MCP servers/tools directly (HTTP or stdio), including ad-hoc server
verdict: Decent shape overall, with hygiene and quality both solid. Weak spots: no version or changelog to track what changed, and no stated boundary against adjacent tools, so it could get invoked for areas another skill covers better. Security is clean.

highlights.summary: No 'NOT for' / exclusion / pointer-to-other-skill language anywhere in description or body, despite covering multiple distinct subcommand areas where misfire against adjacent skill
No version field, changelog section, or dated revision notes anywhere in the file.
